The Proposal: -
As per the provisions of the Maharashtra Forest Produce (Regulation of Trade) Act, 1969, read herein NO.
1, of the Advisory Committee constituted vide Government Notification dated 06.03.2026.
dated 17.03.2026 at 03.00 P.M. by the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Accidental Forest Produce)
A meeting was held under the chairmanship. Purchase of Apta leaves as per the deliberations held in the meeting.
Rates have been recommended. Accordingly, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Untouched Forest Produce), Maharashtra
State, Nagpur Read here Namud No. 2 As recommended by the Advisory Committee under the letter herein
Approval of purchase price of Apta leaves from Government / Private land for Apta season 2026.
A proposal has been submitted and the proposal is under consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Consultants appointed under Section 6 of the Maharashtra Forest Produce (Regulation of Trade) Act, 1969
As per the recommendations of the Committee, for the 2026 Aapta season, strikes from government / private land will be carried out.
The purchase rates of the pages are being fixed as follows: -
